main.description: A single visual-media embed: the blob plus its REQUIRED alt text (accessibility-first, 2026-07-04 ruling) and an optional aspect ratio. Shared def under the `embed.*` family (mirrors `app.bsky.embed.*`) so any record can `ref` it; `app.zurfur.feed.post.embed` is its first and only v1 consumer. NOTE on the size cap: the lexicon has a SINGLE `maxSize` number (100000000 = 100 MB), sized for video — it CANNOT express a tighter per-mime ceiling, so the image sub-cap (images ≤ 10 MB) is enforced app-side at the write/publish path (ZMVP-105), not by this schema. The 'at least one of text/embed' rule that governs whether this embed is present is likewise enforced app-side (a lexicon cannot express either-of).

blob.description: The visual-media file — the work itself. `accept` is the v1 allow-list of image and video mime types; `maxSize` is the hard 100 MB ceiling (video-sized). The image-≤-10 MB sub-cap CANNOT be expressed by this single `maxSize` and is enforced app-side at publish (ZMVP-105). Byte-identical blobs are CID-deduped across posters at the PDS/blob layer.

alt.description: REQUIRED alt-text description of the media, for accessibility (the 2026-07-04 accessibility-first ruling). Structurally required on every embed; the publish path additionally enforces it is non-blank (ZMVP-105).

aspectRatio.description: Optional width:height aspect ratio of the media, for layout before the blob loads.
width:height represents an aspect ratio. It may be approximate and need not correspond to absolute dimensions in any unit.
